statement: The abstract Mosco projection theorem implies strong convergence of the Hilbert orthogonal projections for Mosco-convergent closed subspaces.

abstractMoscoProjectionInputStatus.label: abstract Mosco projection theorem input
abstractMoscoProjectionInputStatus.reason: The abstract theorem proves strong projection convergence.
